description.value:
When you change between your flowering and seeding states, you perform other subtle alterations to your body to enhance your abilities. You can change between a flowering state and a seeding state by spending 1 week of downtime.

If you're flowering, your pleasant aroma makes you more charming. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to [[/act make-an-impression]]; this effect has the olfactory trait. The bonus increases to +2 if you're a master in Diplomacy. If you're seeding, you instead gain immunity to falling damage whenever you're in an atmosphere.
